contents.title: Project Ops: BioFi/MycoFi Q4 Resourcing
contents.content:
# Project Ops: BioFi/MycoFi Q4 Resourcing

**Date**: August 25, 2026
**Lead Author**: @hxordway (Heather Ordway)
**Contributors**: @nick-phl-7 (Nick Hirannet), @furf8 (Dan Furfari), @sarah (Sarah Hirannet)
**Domain**: Operations / Engineering Management

## Engagement Summary
As we transition from exploratory R&D into a full-scale client implementation for the MycoFi initiative, we are structuring the project squads for Q4.

## Resource Allocation & Financial Controls
* **Project Management**: I will serve as the PM. **Furf** is stepping in to oversee the hardware deployment logistics, bringing his Air Products facility project management background to bear on the physical sensor deployment strategies.
* **Contracts & SOWs**: **Nick Hirannet** has finalized the scopes of work with the BioFi partners, structuring milestones around the Data Mesh deliverables and the Cryptoeconomic specifications.
* **Financial Controls**: **Sarah Hirannet** has updated our internal tracking to ensure budget limits are locked for the computational server costs (David's Data Mesh nodes require heavy AWS provisioning).

## Health Check
Drawing on my background in instructional leadership, we're instituting bi-weekly retrospectives to ensure the engineering team (Joshua, Carolina) and the qualitative team (Amber, Ilan) are actively communicating and not retreating into domain silos.

## Financial Controls & Budget Management

**Sarah Hirannet** (@sarah) has implemented comprehensive financial controls for the MycoFi project:

1. **Budget Tracking**: Real-time monitoring of AWS provisioning costs for the data mesh nodes
2. **Milestone-Based Billing**: Tying all BioFi partner invoicing to specific Data Mesh and Cryptoeconomic deliverables
3. **Resource Forecasting**: Predictive budget modeling for Q4 hardware deployment and computational scaling
4. **Cost Optimization**: Working with **David Sisson** to identify opportunities for reserved instance utilization and spot instance scheduling

**Strategic Oversight**: **Nick Hirannet** (@nick-phl-7) provides overall project governance, ensuring that operational execution aligns with BioFi partner expectations and DynamicalSystemsGroup's quality standards. Nick manages the client relationship and coordinates all contractual deliverables.

* **Gantt / Scheduling**: [Slack #project-mycofi](https://dynamicalsystemsgroup.slack.com/archives/C1A2B3D44/p1718001123)
* **Financial Reports**: [Internal Budget Tracker](#)
